name: datavis
description: Vendored @mieweb/datavis source (NITRO data grid) consumed by @mieweb/ui/datavis. Pinned to upstream commit 52c27ccc4f2ae0413eabb2845e02b238ee1f7b85 (~@mieweb/ui 0.6.1). Intentionally has no exports field so the bundler resolves the bare `datavis/src/...` deep imports (.ts/.tsx) the same way the upstream monorepo does. See vendor/datavis/VENDORING.md.
